title: Impact of occurrence conditions on NO <sub>3</sub> <sup>−</sup> -N source apportionment in groundwater: insights from PCA-APCS-MLR and MixSIAR methods
description: SpeakForWater Episode 7: Impact of occurrence conditions on NO <sub>3</sub> <sup>−</sup> -N source apportionment in groundwater: insights from PCA-APCS-MLR and MixSIAR methods. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
